calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-21-2025 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter was set for Court Trial for a Request for Judgment against Defendant Jeff Handy, Defendant Four P's Restaurant Group, LLC, Defendant Fisher Baker & Farmer LLC, Defendant Ministry of Taste, LLC, Defendant 326First LLC and Defendant 860 Restaurant, LLC.

Dept.505: Judge: Dennis Hayashi; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiffs: Deputy Jones and Deputy Belen; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 10:38:37 a.m and concluding at 11:12:20 a.m. (D505)

Joh Fitzpatrick Vannuci, Esq. representing and appearing for Plaintiffs Jennifer Baum, Raesue Kao and Lauren Kiino.
Plaintiff Jennifer Baum, sworn to testify via Zoom Video Conference.
Plaintiff Raesue Kao, sworn to testify via Zoom Video Conference.
Plaintiff Lauren Kiino, sworn to testify via Zoom Video Conference.

Complaint filed Oct-05-2020.
Proof of substituted service as to Defendants filed Dec-18-2020.
Settlement conference held on Sep-03-2024; trial continued by Master Jury Trial Calendar to Department 505 for request for default judgment on Feb-03-2025.

Counsel provides a summary of the facts to the court.
Witness Baum is examined and testifies.
Witness Kao is examined and testifies.
Witness Kiino is examined and testifies.

The Court, at this time, denies the request for punitive damages.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiffs has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendants as follows:

The Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendant:
Damages $4,772,078.21
Pre-Judgment Interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $0
Total Judgment $4,772,078.21

Proposed judgment as amended signed and filed this day.

Off Calendar Apr-02-2025 Continued To May-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-03-2025 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-03-2025 Continued To Apr-04-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Short Cause Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Jeff Handy.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:09 am and concluding at 10:19 am.

Plaintiff Jennifer Baum is represented by John Vannucci, Esq.
Defendant Jeff Handy not appearing.

The Court orders that the Statment of Damages must be served upon the Defendant.

Good cause appearing, The Court Orders the matter continued to April 4, 2025 at 9:00 in Dept 505.
